zh.of Doeveren, Noord Brabant, Netherlands: 荷蘭努-布拉班特多也維倫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joost Adriaensz Doedijns於大約1515年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特梅文時，他的父親Adriaen Doedijns52歲，母親Handersken47歲。他於1546年11月30日之前與Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1593年2月5日在荷蘭努-布拉班特艾騰享年79歲。

zh-hans.of Doeveren, Noord Brabant, Netherlands: 荷兰努-布拉班特多也維倫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joost Adriaensz Doedijns于大约1515年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特梅文时，他的父亲Adriaen Doedijns52岁，母亲Handersken47岁。他于1546年11月30日之前与Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1593年2月5日在荷兰努-布拉班特艾騰享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Joost
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Jodocus, Latinized form of the Breton name Iodoc, meaning ‘lord’, altered under the influence of the biblical name Job.

historicEvents.description: The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.
William of Orange was recognized as viceroy of Holland, Friesland and Utrecht.
The siege of Leiden between the rebels and the Spanish. 1574 The dikes were opened allowing a Dutch fleet to sail over the flood waters and rescue Leiden.

The Union of Utrecht brought together seven northern, Protestant provinces of the Netherlands against the Catholics. Known as the United Provinces, they become the foundation of the Dutch Republic. The Treaty of Utrecht was signed, marking the beginning of the Dutch Republic.
After the signing of the Treaty of Utrecht in 1579, Brabant became a regular battlefield between the Republic of the Netherlands (Protestant) and Spain (Catholic).

en.lifeSummary: When Joost Adriaensz Doedijns was born about 1515, in Meeuwen, North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Adriaen Doedijns, was 52 and his mother, Handersken, was 47. He married Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven before 30 November 1546. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 5 February 1593, in Eethen, North Brabant, Netherlands, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joost Adriaensz Doedijns est né environ 1515, à Meeuwen, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Adriaen Doedijns, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Handersken, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven avant 30 novembre 1546. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 février 1593, à Eethen, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joost Adriaensz Doedijns um 1515 in Meeuwen, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adriaen Doedijns 52 und seine Mutter Handersken 47. Er hat vor 30. November 1546 Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Februar 1593 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Eethen, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joost Adriaensz Doedijns è nato il circa 1515 nel Meeuwen, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Adriaen Doedijns, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Handersken, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven prima del 30 novembre 1546. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 febbraio 1593, nel Eethen, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.Meeuwen, Noord Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントメエウウン
ja.of Eethen, Noord Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントイースン
ja.Drunen, North Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントドルン
ja.of Doeveren, Noord Brabant, Netherlands: オランダノオルド-ブラバントドエバーン
ja.Eethen, Gemeente Aalburg, North Brabant,: オランダノオルド-ブラバントイースン
ja.lifeSummary: Joost Adriaensz Doedijnsが約1515年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントメエウウンで生まれた時，父Adriaen Doedijnsは52歳，母Handerskenは47歳であった。1546年11月30日以前にAgnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthovenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1593年2月5日にオランダノオルド-ブラバントイースンで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joost Adriaensz Doedijns(이)가 대략 1515년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 미우웬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adriaen Doedijns(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Handersken(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1546년 11월 30일 이전 Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1593년 2월 5일 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 이테에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Meeuwen, Noord Brabant, Netherlands: Meeuwen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.of Eethen, Noord Brabant, Netherlands: Eethen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Drunen, North Brabant, Netherlands: Drunen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.of Doeveren, Noord Brabant, Netherlands: Doeveren, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.Eethen, Gemeente Aalburg, North Brabant,: Eethen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joost Adriaensz Doedijns nasceu aproximadamente 1515, em Meeuwen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Adriaen Doedijns, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Handersken, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven antes 30 de novembro de 1546. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de fevereiro de 1593, em Eethen, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joost Adriaensz Doedijns родился около 1515 г. в местности миувен, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Adriaen Doedijns было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Handersken, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven перед 30 ноябрь 1546 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 февраля 1593 г. в местности эетен, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joost Adriaensz Doedijns nació aproximadamente 1515, en Meeuwen, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, su papá, Adriaen Doedijns, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Handersken, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Agnes Peters Jans Ottensdr van Vuijthoven antes de 30 de noviembre de 1546. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de febrero de 1593, en Eethen, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos, a la edad de 79 años.
